name: Data Change Reactivity
description: How incoming data changes flow through React memos and trigger re-renders

scenarios.description: Repositories load initially without file tree metrics (fileCount=0, lineCount=0). This is phase 1 of a two-phase load.

template.summary: Initial load for '{{collection.id}}' - {{repositories.count}} repos WITHOUT file metrics

events.collection-map.metrics-received: [{{collection.id}}] No file metrics yet: {{repositories.count}} repos, 0 files, 0 lines (hash: {{repositories.ref.hash}})
events.collection-map.initial-load-no-metrics: [{{collection.id}}] MARKER: Initial load detected - {{repositories.count}} repos waiting for file tree scan

scenarios.description: File tree metrics arrive after initial load. This is phase 2 - repos now have fileCount/lineCount. UI should update to reflect new sizes.

template.summary: File metrics arrived for '{{collection.id}}' - {{metrics.total.files}} files, {{metrics.total.lines}} lines

events.collection-map.nodes-memo-recalc: [{{collection.id}}] Recalculated {{nodes.count}} nodes (trigger: {{trigger.dep}}, metrics changed: {{trigger.metrics.changed}}, total size: {{computed.total.size}})
events.collection-map.scene-update: [{{collection.id}}] Scene updated with new sizes: {{nodes.count}} nodes ({{update.type}})

scenarios.description: Generic data change triggers full memo chain recalculation and scene update

template.summary: Data change for collection '{{collection.id}}' - {{nodes.count}} nodes recalculated

events.collection-map.metrics-received: [{{collection.id}}] Metrics snapshot: {{repositories.count}} repos (ref: {{repositories.ref.hash}}), {{metrics.total.files}} files, {{metrics.total.lines}} lines, latest edit: {{metrics.latest.edited}}
events.collection-map.nodes-memo-recalc: [{{collection.id}}] Recalculated {{nodes.count}} GenericNodes (trigger: {{trigger.dep}}, metrics changed: {{trigger.metrics.changed}}, total size: {{computed.total.size}})
